# 网易主题 `netease`

品牌红，来自网易标志色，正红系。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #C20C0C;
    --primary-dark:  #8A0000;
    --primary-light: #E03030;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF0F0;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(194, 12, 12, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #500000 0%, #880000 35%, #C20C0C 65%, #E83232 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #500000 0%, #880000 50%, #C20C0C 100%);
    --red:           #C20C0C;
    --green:         #2D8F00;
    --orange:        #F07800;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #500000 0%, #880000 50%, #C20C0C 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #500000 0%, #880000 35%, #C20C0C 65%, #E83232 100%) !important; }
```
